case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DOLORES MAYS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT MAYS, DOLORES DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (ENDORSED COPY IN DEPT. 206)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED NOV-12-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAYS, DOLORES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED NOV-13-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MAYS, DOLORES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYS, DOLORES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1760 BUSH STREET, #506, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $7.26 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MAYS, DOLORES
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MAYS, DOLORES
